hero.subtitle: Empowering the next generation of blockchain builders in DR Congo through education, incubation, and community.

home.whatSubtitle: A Web3 innovation center dedicated to building blockchain infrastructure and talent in Central Africa.
home.whatDesc: We believe that decentralized technologies can transform communities. Through workshops, hackathons, and project incubation, we're creating a vibrant ecosystem where innovation thrives at the foot of the Nyiragongo volcano.
home.upcomingSubtitle: Join us for workshops, hackathons, and meetups.
home.projectsSubtitle: Innovative solutions built by our community.
home.newsletterSubtitle: Subscribe to our newsletter for the latest Web3 news from Goma.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Discover our mission, vision, and the people driving Web3 innovation in Central Africa.
about.missionDesc: Develop the Web3 ecosystem in Goma and train the next generation of blockchain builders. We provide the tools, education, and community support needed to turn innovative ideas into impactful decentralized solutions.
about.visionDesc: Make Goma a leading center of blockchain innovation in Africa. We envision a thriving ecosystem where local talent creates world-class decentralized solutions that address real challenges.
about.obj1Desc: Comprehensive blockchain education programs for developers and entrepreneurs.
about.obj2Desc: Supporting innovative Web3 projects from ideation to launch.
about.obj3Desc: Connecting builders with mentors, investors, and global communities.
about.obj4Desc: Showcasing local talent and projects on the global blockchain stage.

events.title: Events
events.subtitle: Workshops, hackathons, and meetups driving Web3 adoption in Goma.
events.eventAlreadyPassed: This event has already taken place. Registration is no longer available.
events.event1Desc: A 3-day intensive bootcamp covering Ethereum, Solidity, and DApp development.
events.event2Desc: 48-hour hackathon building decentralized finance solutions for Eastern Congo.
events.event3Desc: Introduction to blockchain technology for beginners.
events.event4Desc: Hands-on Cardano smart contract development with Plutus.
events.event5Desc: Exploring how blockchain technology can address social challenges.
events.event6Desc: Creating and minting NFTs: a workshop for local artists.
events.alreadyRegistered: You are already registered for this event.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Innovative Web3 solutions built and incubated by Goma Hub.
projects.proj1Desc: Decentralized payment solution enabling merchants in Eastern Congo to accept crypto payments seamlessly.
projects.proj2Desc: Blockchain-verified academic credentials for Congolese universities, fighting diploma fraud.
projects.proj3Desc: Community governance platform for Nyiragongo environmental monitoring and disaster preparedness.
projects.proj4Desc: Decentralized internet infrastructure for underserved areas around Lake Kivu.
projects.proj5Desc: Supply chain tracking for local agricultural products ensuring fair trade practices.
projects.proj6Desc: AI-powered health records on blockchain for secure and portable medical data.

community.title: Join Our
community.subtitle: Be part of the fastest-growing Web3 community in Central Africa.
community.howSubtitle: Get involved in the Goma Hub ecosystem.
community.discordDesc: Connect with builders, ask questions, and collaborate on projects.
community.telegramDesc: Stay updated with announcements and community discussions.
community.attendDesc: Meet the community in person at our workshops and meetups.
community.ambassadorSubtitle: Represent Goma Hub in your university or community.
community.ambassadorDesc: As a Goma Hub Ambassador, you'll organize local events, mentor newcomers, and help spread Web3 education across DR Congo. Ambassadors get exclusive access to resources, mentorship, and project funding opportunities.
community.test1: Goma Hub gave me the skills and network to launch my first DApp. The community here is incredible!
community.test2: Before Goma Hub, blockchain felt impossible to learn. Now I'm building smart contracts!
community.test3: The incubation program helped me turn my idea into a funded project. Forever grateful.

blog.title: Blog & News
blog.subtitle: Latest updates from Goma Hub and the Web3 ecosystem.
blog.p1Title: Goma Hub Launches Web3 Incubation Program
blog.p1Excerpt: We're excited to announce our first cohort of Web3 projects for incubation. Applications are now open for innovative blockchain solutions.
blog.p2Excerpt: Over 50 participants joined our hands-on DeFi workshop. Here's what we learned and built together.
blog.p3Title: Cardano Staking in DR Congo: A Guide
blog.p3Excerpt: Everything you need to know about Cardano staking and how it's being used in the Congolese context.
blog.p4Title: The Future of Blockchain in Central Africa
blog.p4Excerpt: An analysis of blockchain adoption trends and opportunities across the Central African region.
blog.p5Title: Meet Our First Cohort of Web3 Builders
blog.p5Excerpt: Introducing the talented builders who are creating decentralized solutions at Goma Hub.
blog.p6Title: Why Web3 Matters for Developing Nations
blog.p6Excerpt: Exploring how decentralized technologies can address financial inclusion and governance challenges.

validators.title: Validator Operations
validators.subtitle: Securing blockchain networks and supporting decentralization from Central Africa.
validators.cardanoDesc: Goma Hub operates a Cardano stake pool, contributing to network decentralization and earning rewards for our community delegators.
validators.apexDesc: Running validator infrastructure for Apex Fusion's cross-chain protocol, supporting interoperability between blockchain networks.
validators.safroDesc: Supporting Safrochain's Africa-focused blockchain infrastructure through validator operations and community governance participation.

footer.desc: Building the Web3 future in Goma, DR Congo. A center for blockchain innovation in Central Africa.
